title: Riding Name Change Act, 2014
description: An Act to change the names of certain electoral districts and to amend the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act (Riding Name Change Act, 2014). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Riding Name Change Act, 2014 .

provisions.title: Name changed to “Thérèse-De Blainville”
provisions.content: 2 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 13 of the part relating to Quebec is amended by substituting the name “Thérèse-De Blainville” for the name “Blainville”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Pierre-Boucher — ​​Les Patriotes — ​​Verchères”
provisions.content: 3 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 14 of the part relating to Quebec is amended by substituting the name “Pierre-Boucher — Les Patriotes — Verchères” for the name “Boucher — Les Patriotes — Verchères”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Rimouski-Neigette — ​​Témiscouata — ​​Les Basques”
provisions.content: 4 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 18 of the part relating to Quebec is amended by substituting the name “Rimouski-Neigette — Témiscouata — Les Basques” for the name “Centre-du-Bas-Saint-Laurent”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Beauport — ​​Côte-de-Beaupré — ​​Île d’Orléans — ​​Charlevoix”
provisions.content: 5 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 20 of the part relating to Quebec is amended by substituting the name “Beauport — Côte-de-Beaupré — Île d’Orléans — ​Charlevoix” for the name “Charlevoix — Montmorency”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Chicoutimi — ​​Le Fjord”
provisions.content: 6 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 22 of the part relating to Quebec is amended by substituting the name “Chicoutimi — Le Fjord” for the name “Chicoutimi”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Dorval — ​​Lachine — ​​LaSalle”
provisions.content: 7 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 24 of the part relating to Quebec is amended by substituting the name “Dorval — Lachine — LaSalle” for the name “Dorval — Lachine”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “LaSalle — ​​Émard — ​​Verdun”
provisions.content: 8 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 37 of the part relating to Quebec is amended by substituting the name “LaSalle — Émard — Verdun” for the name “LaSalle — Verdun”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Longueuil — ​​Charles-LeMoyne”
provisions.content: 9 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 41 of the part relating to Quebec is amended by substituting the name “Longueuil — Charles-LeMoyne” for the name “LeMoyne”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Longueuil — ​​Saint-Hubert”
provisions.content: 10 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 43 of the part relating to Quebec is amended by substituting the name “Longueuil — Saint-Hubert” for the name “Longueuil”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Mount Royal”
provisions.content: 11 In the English version of the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 52 of the part relating to Quebec is amended by substituting the name “Mount Royal” for the name “Mont-Royal”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Marc-Aurèle-Fortin”
provisions.content: 12 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 65 of the part relating to Quebec is amended by substituting the name “Marc-Aurèle-Fortin” for the name “Sainte-Rose”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Vaudreuil — ​​Soulanges”
provisions.content: 13 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 74 of the part relating to Quebec is amended by substituting the name “Vaudreuil — Soulanges” for the name “Soulanges — Vaudreuil”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Ville-Marie — ​​Le Sud-Ouest — ​​Île-des-Soeurs”
provisions.content: 14 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 77 of the part relating to Quebec is amended by substituting the name “Ville-Marie — Le Sud-Ouest — Île-des-Soeurs” for the name “Ville-Marie”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Brantford — ​​Brant”
provisions.content: 15 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 13 of the part relating to Ontario is amended by substituting the name “Brantford — Brant” for the name “Brant”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Lanark — ​​Frontenac — ​​Kingston”
provisions.content: 16 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 49 of the part relating to Ontario is amended by substituting the name “Lanark — Frontenac — Kingston” for the name “Lanark — Frontenac”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Leeds — ​​Grenville — ​​Thousand Islands and Rideau Lakes”
provisions.content: 17 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 50 of the part relating to Ontario is amended by substituting the name “Leeds — Grenville — Thousand Islands and Rideau Lakes” for the name “Leeds — Grenville”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Mississauga East — ​​Cooksville”
provisions.content: 18 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 59 of the part relating to Ontario is amended by substituting the name “Mississauga East — Cooksville” for the name “Mississauga — Cooksville”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Northumberland — ​​Peterborough South”
provisions.content: 19 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 71 of the part relating to Ontario is amended by substituting the name “Northumberland — Peterborough South” for the name “Northumberland — Pine Ridge”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Orléans”
provisions.content: 20 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 76 of the part relating to Ontario is amended by substituting the name “Orléans” for the name “Ottawa — Orléans”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Peterborough — ​​Kawartha”
provisions.content: 21 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 84 of the part relating to Ontario is amended by substituting the name “Peterborough — Kawartha” for the name “Peterborough”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Carleton”
provisions.content: 22 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 88 of the part relating to Ontario is amended by substituting the name “Carleton” for the name “Rideau — Carleton”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Toronto — ​​St. Paul’s”
provisions.content: 23 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 90 of the part relating to Ontario is amended by substituting the name “Toronto — St. Paul’s” for the name “St. Paul’s”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Humber River — ​​Black Creek”
provisions.content: 24 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 121 of the part relating to Ontario is amended by substituting the name “Humber River — Black Creek” for the name “York West”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Carlton Trail — ​​Eagle Creek”
provisions.content: 25 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 4 of the part relating to Saskatchewan is amended by substituting the name “Carlton Trail — Eagle Creek” for the name “Humboldt — Warman — Martensville — ​Rosetown”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Grande Prairie — ​​Mackenzie”
provisions.content: 26 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 24 of the part relating to Alberta is amended by substituting the name “Grande Prairie — Mackenzie” for the name “Grande Prairie”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Medicine Hat — ​​Cardston — ​​Warner”
provisions.content: 27 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 27 of the part relating to Alberta is amended by substituting the name “Medicine Hat — Cardston — Warner” for the name “Medicine Hat”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Red Deer — ​​Lacombe”
provisions.content: 28 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 30 of the part relating to Alberta is amended by substituting the name “Red Deer — Lacombe” for the name “Red Deer — Wolf Creek”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Sturgeon River — ​​Parkland”
provisions.content: 29 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 33 of the part relating to Alberta is amended by substituting the name “Sturgeon River — Parkland” for the name “Sturgeon River”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “Esquimalt — ​​Saanich — ​​Sooke”
provisions.content: 30 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 26 of the part relating to British Columbia is amended by substituting the name “Esquimalt — Saanich — Sooke” for the name “Saanich — Esquimalt — Juan de Fuca”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “North Island — ​​Powell River”
provisions.content: 31 In the representation order declared in force by proclamation of October 1, 2013 under the Electoral Boundaries Readjustment Act , paragraph 37 of the part relating to British Columbia is amended by substituting the name “North Island — Powell River” for the name “Vancouver Island North — Comox — Powell River”.

provisions.title: Name changed to “North Island — ​​Powell River”
